correct_cappuccino.narrator_text: The machine hisses, steams, and gurgles. A perfect cappuccino materialises — frothy milk, dusted with cinnamon. It smells incredible.

already_have.narrator_text: You already have a cappuccino. Maybe go give it to someone who needs it.

wrong_americano.narrator_text: The machine clunks and dispenses a very black, very bitter americano. You hold it up towards the receptionist. She sniffs the air and her nose wrinkles. 'I appreciate the gesture, but that's not quite right... still too tired.' The cup slips from your hand. Coffee everywhere.

choices.text: Maybe I should think harder about this.

wrong_espresso.narrator_text: The machine vibrates violently and spits out a tiny, intense espresso. You hold it towards the receptionist. She squints at it. 'That's... a lot of intensity for one cup. I need something with more balance. Nice try though.' The espresso cup tips over. It was only two sips anyway.

choices.text: I should think about what she actually wants.
